# Moblync
> AI-powered app design tool. Generate UI mockups, user flows, and mobile app prototypes using artificial intelligence. Built for designers, agencies, and product teams.

## What We Offer
AI-powered app design tool. Generate UI mockups, user flows, and mobile app prototypes using artificial intelligence. Built for designers, agencies, and product teams.
